title: ICU post-operative admission review

treatment_and_management.text: Supports documented procedure name, counts, specimen labeling, equipment problems, and key recovery or management concerns without generating a plan.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports completed procedure, counts, specimen, equipment and recovery concerns at operating-room exit for post-operative ICU admission review; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports documented procedure name, counts, specimen labeling, equipment problems, and key recovery or management concerns without generating a plan.

source.title: WHO Guidelines for Safe Surgery 2009: Safe Surgery Saves Lives — Surgical Safety Checklist and Implementation Manual

exact_section.heading: Before patient leaves operating room — Sign Out

follow_up.text: Defines the postoperative surgical-wound population and supports wound dressing, cleansing, wound-healing, and structured postoperative wound-care documentation.
follow_up.rationale: Supports entered postoperative wound-care context for post-operative ICU admission review; no decision is generated.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Defines the postoperative surgical-wound population and supports wound dressing, cleansing, wound-healing, and structured postoperative wound-care documentation.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Procedure, anaesthesia, complications, airway, physiology, losses, fluids, medicines, drains, wound and planned supports are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, escalation or disposition is generated for post-operative ICU admission review.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
